languages.text: "Иокаста, забери его. И позаботься о том, чтобы его мучения продлились как можно дольше".

traits.locale_text: "Иокаста, забери его. И позаботься о том, чтобы его мучения продлились как можно дольше".

languages.text: "Jocasta, take him away. And make sure his suffering lasts as long as possible."
languages.original_text: "Иокаста, забери его. И позаботься о том, чтобы его мучения продлились как можно дольше".

traits.locale_text: "Jocasta, take him away. And make sure his suffering lasts as long as possible."
"Jocasta, take him away. And make sure his suffering lasts as long as possible."
"Jocasta, take him away. And make sure his suffering lasts as long as possible."
"Jocasta, take him away. And make sure his suffering lasts as long as possible."

languages.text: "Jocasta, schafft ihn weg. Und seht zu, dass er möglichst lange leidet."
languages.original_text: "Jocasta, take him away. And make sure his suffering lasts as long as possible."

traits.locale_text: "Jocasta, schafft ihn weg. Und seht zu, dass er möglichst lange leidet."

languages.text: « Jocasta, emmenez-le. Assurez-vous de prolonger ses souffrances le plus possible. »
languages.original_text: "Jocasta, take him away. And make sure his suffering lasts as long as possible."

traits.locale_text: « Jocasta, emmenez-le. Assurez-vous de prolonger ses souffrances le plus possible. »

languages.text: “约卡斯塔，把他带走，让他尽可能地多痛苦一会儿。”
languages.original_text: "Jocasta, take him away. And make sure his suffering lasts as long as possible."

traits.locale_text: “约卡斯塔，把他带走，让他尽可能地多痛苦一会儿。”

languages.text: «Jocasta, lléveselo. Prolongue su sufrimiento tanto como pueda».
languages.original_text: "Jocasta, take him away. And make sure his suffering lasts as long as possible."

traits.locale_text: «Jocasta, lléveselo. Prolongue su sufrimiento tanto como pueda».

languages.text: 「ジョカスタ、彼を連れて行け。そして、彼の苦しみができるだけ長く続くようにしてください」
languages.original_text: "Jocasta, take him away. And make sure his suffering lasts as long as possible."

traits.locale_text: 「ジョカスタ、彼を連れて行け。そして、彼の苦しみができるだけ長く続くようにしてください」

languages.text: "Jocasta, götür onu. Acısının olabildiğince uzun sürmesini sağla."
languages.original_text: "Jocasta, take him away. And make sure his suffering lasts as long as possible."

traits.locale_text: "Jocasta, götür onu. Acısının olabildiğince uzun sürmesini sağla."
